g.text: - User interaction entry: APP-020 serving ACT-001 and delegating writes to APP-021
- Event-sourced persistence path: APP-001 serving orchestration and dashboard interaction components
- APP-008 is shown as the SA specialist exemplar for this Phase C slice.
- PM invocation is role-polymorphic via AgentRegistry; the same pattern applies to other specialist agents (for example APP-009/010/011/012/014/015).
